name: J P Morgan Chase & Co Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of 4.55% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series JJ
summary: This ticker represents a depositary share, each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of JPMorgan Chase & Co's 4.55% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series JJ. It signifies ownership in a specific class of preferred stock issued by JPMorgan Chase & Co, offering a fixed dividend payment.
